title: Personal medical and athletic history discussion

segments.text: I had a TBI from a car accident with a brain hemorrhage.
Later I had a second concussion and broke my back from horses and mountain biking.
I used to be an elite cyclist at the University of Oklahoma.
A CT scan found lung nodules, and I have about a 13.5 pack year smoking history.
My diet has evolved a lot over time rather than staying fixed.
My weight history runs from under 100 pounds up through about 170 during racing years.
